name: Gujarat Raffia Industries Limited
summary: Gujarat Raffia Industries Limited manufactures and sells polyethylene tarpaulins, high density polyethylene (HDPE)/polypropylene (PP) woven sacks, and fabrics in India. It also offers PE tarpaulins, plastic and ground sheetings, geomembranes, tents, shelters, pond and canal linings, fumigation covers, HDPE and PP woven bags, azolla beds, grow bags, weed mats, vermibed and ropes, etc. The company also exports its products worldwide. Gujarat Raffia Industries Limited was founded in 1984 and is based in Gandhinagar, India.
